title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 416.151 - State's remedies to be cumulative — only one monetary recovery on any one act
text:
416.151.  State's remedies to be cumulative — only one monetary recovery on any one act. — The remedies afforded the state under sections 416.011 to 416.161 shall be cumulative but the state shall not be permitted more than one recovery of monetary damages arising out of the same act or injury.
(L. 1974 S.B. 424)
